title: A Phone Call at Night
content: At almost midnight, Ethan's phone rang unexpectedly. When he answered, nobody spoke. He could only hear soft static before the call ended. The same thing happened the next evening. Curious, he contacted his phone company. They discovered that an old automatic alarm system was mistakenly calling his number after a recent update. Once the problem was fixed, the mysterious calls stopped. Ethan finally enjoyed peaceful nights again.
